title: Baliuag Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Baliuag with a Z-Score of +5.49. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Baliuag are characterized by high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 18.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 45%, which may lead to increased discomfort and health risks. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 8.5 km/h, providing little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
